title: Personal Information Update - Former Student
content:
Personal Information Update - Former Student
Morgan State University - Office of the Registrar

This guide is for FORMER STUDENTS. It explains how to update your personal information on file with the university after you are no longer enrolled.

Contact: records@morgan.edu

---

STEP 1: GATHER REQUIRED DOCUMENTATION
No substitutions are accepted. You must provide the exact documents listed below.

Legal Name Change (requires 2 of the following):
- Marriage License
- Social Security Card
- Legal Name Change document
- Passport
- Driver's License
- Driver's Permit
- State ID
- Military ID
- Birth Certificate
- Divorce Papers

Date of Birth Change (requires BOTH):
- Valid government-issued photo ID
- Birth Certificate

Gender Change (requires 1):
- Valid government-issued photo ID

Social Security Number Change (requires BOTH):
- Valid government-issued photo ID
- Social Security Card

---

STEP 2: ENTER YOUR INFORMATION
Enter your Student ID (8-digit number), your name, and your email address. If you do not know your Student ID, enter the last 4 digits of your Social Security Number or your Date of Birth instead.

---

STEP 3: SELECT INFORMATION TO UPDATE
Choose what you need to update:
- Legal Name
- Birthdate
- Social Security Number
- Permanent Address
- Billing Address
- Gender

---

STEP 4: ATTACH REQUIRED DOCUMENTATION
Upload all required documents based on the type of change you selected in Step 3.

---

STEP 5: SUBMIT
Submit the form. Processing takes up to 3 business days.

For the full official guide with screenshots, view: [Personal Info Update - Former Student Guide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1UuxrSBZUMft3oHp5CdmF01rL7-w_Tmc7/view)
